name: Arobynn: Sword of Adventure
short_description: Arobynn is a VR Adventure game in development. Help it grow by sharing it with your community and sharing feedback with the developer. It takes inspiration from adventure anime and is developing to include a great combat system and supportive casual occupations.
detailed_description:
Welcome to the adventurer's guild! Rank up by completing quests and improve your gear by collecting rare drops that you can craft into better weapons and armor in the guild forge. Level up to improve your stats and practice to master fighting with swords or magic as you tackle increasingly difficult dungeons. If it is too difficult to succeed alone, party up with friends to conquer stronger foes!

Backstory. In the past, most of the living word and the surface were destroyed during the Geocubic wars. A devastating technology that disrupts molecular bonds (Molecular Disruption Device) and re-crystalizes structures was weaponized and led to the collapse of modern civilization. Nothing is left from the world before. Countless years have passed and now every child's dream is to grow up and become an Adventurer. This is where you start and your origin story, Welcome to the Adventurer's Guild!

In the past genetic hybrids and fantastical creatures were pretty normal and often kept as pets, observed at zoos or within nature preserves, and used for industrial purposes. I would not recommend petting the decedents that you meet on your adventures, but I won't stop you from trying. Who knows, maybe you can find a way to tame them.

******

Developers Note: This game is an ongoing effort to make the best sword based VRMMO imaginable. Play it now and enjoy its growth every step of the way. Create your own character, collect legendary gear, and level up in this exciting adventure!

DID YOU KNOW POSITIVE REVIEWS IMPROVE A GAMES DISCOVERABILITY AND GROWTH, AND NEGATIVE REVIEWS CAN KILL GAMES? YOU CAN GIVE A GAME A POSITIVE REVIEW TO HELP IT GROW AND STILL SAY WHAT YOU LIKE AND WHAT YOU THINK WOULD MAKE THE GAME BETTER. POSITIVE FEEDBACK IS GREATLY APPRECIATED <3
